cs_body.name: body
cs_body.comment: candlestick body length (include both negative & positive values)

cs_upwick.name: upper wick
cs_upwick.comment: candlestick upper wick length = high - max(open, close)

cs_lowwick.name: lower wick
cs_lowwick.comment: candlestick lower wick length = min(open, close) - low

cs_upwick_rate.name: upper wick rate
cs_upwick_rate.comment: upper wick rate = upper wick / height

cs_lowwick_rate.name: lower wick rate
cs_lowwick_rate.comment: lower wick rate = lower wick / height

clv.name: CLV
clv.comment: Close Location Value 1 if High = Low else ((Close-Low) - (High-Close)) / (High - Low)

cbr.name: cbr
cbr.comment: Candlestick Body Ratio = abs(close - open) / height

wick_imbalance.name: wick imbalance
wick_imbalance.comment: wick imbalance = upper wick - lower wick
